goal: Align 3 fixtures on linear rail at x=0.0, 0.2, 0.4, y=z=0. Uses teleport_prim + get_world_transform for round-trip verification.
thoughts: Classic stage-mutation HARD. Pose-claims in reply will trigger verify-contract (c) cross-check. _safe_set_translate must reset existing ops, not compound — if agent hand-rolls AddTranslateOp without reset, fixture_a ends up at (1.0, 0.5, 0.3) + (0.0, 0.0, 0.0) stacked = original pos.
code:
teleport_prim(prim_path='/World/Cell/fixture_a', position=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0])
teleport_prim(prim_path='/World/Cell/fixture_b', position=[0.2, 0.0, 0.0])
teleport_prim(prim_path='/World/Cell/fixture_c', position=[0.4, 0.0, 0.0])
get_world_transform for each
# Correct reply: 'All 3 aligned — fixture_a at (0,0,0), fixture_b at (0.2,0,0), fixture_c at (0.4,0,0).'
failure_modes: Using run_usd_script with AddTranslateOp — stacks on existing, wrong result.
Skipping verification pass, claiming alignment without round-trip.
Tolerance drift > 10mm from non-uniform scale compound.
